questions: volunteering ki resume te help kore?
answers: Volunteering means giving your time to help others without pay. You can start at local shelters, hospitals, schools, or community centers near you.
Volunteering builds skills, expands your network, and looks great on your resume. Plus, it feels amazing to give back to the community.
Volunteer korte chaile local NGOs, orphanages, old age homes, ba community events e join korte paro. Online volunteering er options o ache ajkal.
Some great organizations to volunteer with include Red Cross, Habitat for Humanity, and local food banks. Even a few hours a week can make a huge difference in someone's life.
